faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Pelham Gardens typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Pelham Gardens home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Pelham Gardens homes take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or require 2-3 visits for chemical applications spaced 2-3 weeks apart. The timeline depends on your property size and infestation level, and we'll provide a specific schedule during your free inspection.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure complete safety for your household.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a 60-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Pelham Gardens. If bed bugs return within this period, we'll retreat your home at no additional cost. We also provide free follow-up inspections to verify complete elimination.
